# Read raw file bytes and print with indices and content to locate verses.
path="/mnt/data/file-C339qtJBQGWvecT5q32yAX-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path,"rb") as f:
    data = f.read()
s = data.decode('utf-8')
print(len(s))
print(s[:1000])

positions=[i for i,ch in enumerate(s) if ch=='﴿']
positions, len(positions)

raw = s
records=[]
for start,end,full in spans:
    inner = raw[start+1:end]  # exclude bracket chars
    # Trim edges per rule: remove quotes, punctuation, spaces etc.
    import re
    # define chars to trim: whitespace and punctuation including Arabic commas etc, and quotes and tatweel
    trim_chars = r'^[\s\-\u0600-\u0604\u061f\u061b\u061f\u066a\u066b\u066c\u06DD\u06DE\u06A4\"\'«»\(\)\[\]\{\}\<\>\,\.،؛:!؟…ـ]+|[\s\-\u0600-\u0604\u061f\u061b\u061f\u066a\u066b\u066c\u06DD\u06DE\u06A4\"\'«»\(\)\[\]\{\}\<\>\,\.،؛:!؟…ـ]+$'
    cleaned = re.sub(trim_chars,'',inner)
    # Find occurrence index of cleaned in raw near start
    found = raw.find(cleaned, max(0,start-5), start+5)
    if found==-1:
        found = raw.find(cleaned)
    assert found!=-1, (cleaned[:30], "not found")
    rec = {'start':found, 'end':found+len(cleaned), 'text':cleaned}
    records.append(rec)

for r in records:
    print(r['start'], r['end'], repr(r['text']))
